problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: If Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
